hero.name: Sanghyeon Shin
hero.title: Aspiring PM/PO
hero.subtitle: Dreaming of becoming a PM/PO who solves user problems through planning, design, and development

about.heading: About
about.description_1: 10+ awards across startup IR pitching and hackathons. 10+ products planned, designed, and shipped end-to-end. I’m a PM who owns every step from raw idea to real users.
about.description_2: HUFS GBT × AI Convergence (GPA 4.14/4.5) · SQLD · ADsP certified. I define problems with data, design in Figma, and build in React & Next.js — handling planning, design, and development all on my own.
about.description_3: Currently deepening my engineering skills at SSAFY 15th cohort. My goal: ship products people actually use, make decisions backed by data, and grow teams in the process.
